Become a Member

Join a community of makers, artists, and builders on Cape Cod.

Membership Plans

All memberships are month-to-month with no long-term commitment required. Cancel any time with 30 days notice.

Associate

$25 /month

Access to community events and discounted workshops.

  • Attend open houses and public events
  • Discounted rates on workshops
  • Community newsletter
  • Vote in general meetings
Get Started
Most Popular

Full Member

$75 /month

Full access to the shop, tools, and all member benefits.

  • All Associate benefits
  • 24/7 key-fob shop access
  • Use of all tools and equipment
  • Member storage space
  • Use of consumables (within reason)
  • Priority event registration
Get Started

Student

$35 /month

Discounted full membership for currently enrolled students.

  • All Full Member benefits
  • Valid student ID required
  • Renewable each semester
Get Started

Questions about membership? Contact us — we're happy to help.

How to Join

1

Visit an Open House

Come meet us, tour the space, and ask questions.

2

Complete Your Application

Fill out a membership form and complete our safety orientation.

3

Start Making

Get your key fob and start using the space right away.

Frequently Asked Questions

Do I need prior experience to join? ▼
No experience is required! We welcome complete beginners and offer orientation sessions for major equipment.
Can I try before committing? ▼
Yes! Come to one of our open houses to tour the space and meet our members before signing up.
What tools and equipment are available? ▼
We have woodworking, metalworking, electronics, 3D printing, and more. See our Facilities page for the full list.

Cape Cod Makers

204 Sisson Road
Harwich, MA 02645
info@capecodmakers.org
